rat: The rats got you. The Pawnbroker will not be surprised.
roach: Outpaced by a roach. Don't tell the kid at the deli.
pigeon: A pigeon dive-bombed you out of business.
raccoon: A trash panda. A trash panda did this. Walk it off.
seagull: The gulls run protection. The gulls won.
feral-cat: Alley cat caught you on the wind-up.
sewer-fish: Pulled under. The water was warm.
street-dog: Pack hunters. Should've watched the flank.
goose: Outdove by a goose. There is no dignified way to phrase this.
boss-dumpster-bear: Whatever was in the dumpster, it isn't anymore. Now it's behind you.
boss-river-mutant: Saint Anthony finds lost things. He'll find you in the morning.
boss-pigeon-king: He has been waiting longer than you have been alive. He kept waiting.
wipe: He'll find another kid. He always does.
